summary: Iteration 2 testing complete - All NEW features tested and working: Credentials management API (CRUD), Settings panel Credentials tab, Install App tab with PWA instructions, TTS toggle on chat header, PWA manifest.json and sw.js accessible, Mobile responsive hamburger menu.
critical_code_review_comments: Credentials API properly masks sensitive values (first 4 + **** + last 4 chars)
Short keys (<8 chars) correctly show only ****
TTS toggle persists state to localStorage
PWA service worker caches static assets and handles offline navigation
Mobile responsive design working with hamburger menu overlay

success_rate.backend: 100% (34/34 tests passed - 10 new credentials tests + 24 existing)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - using existing admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 2 tested and working: 1) Credentials API (POST/GET/PUT/DELETE) with proper masking, 2) Settings panel has 3 tabs (General/Credentials/Install App), 3) TTS toggle on chat header toggles between 'TTS Ativo' and 'TTS Desligado', 4) PWA manifest.json and sw.js accessible at root, 5) Mobile hamburger menu opens sidebar overlay. Previous iteration 1 features still working.

credentials_api.POST /api/credentials: PASS - Creates credential with masked value returned
credentials_api.GET /api/credentials: PASS - Returns list with masked values (key_masked field)

settings_panel_credentials_tab.add_credential_form: PASS - Service dropdown, name input, key/token input
settings_panel_credentials_tab.credential_list: PASS - Shows service badge, name, masked value

settings_panel_install_tab.installation_instructions: PASS - Android, iPhone, Desktop instructions visible
settings_panel_install_tab.install_button: PASS - Shows when beforeinstallprompt event fires

tts_toggle.chat_header_toggle: PASS - Visible on desktop when conversation active
tts_toggle.toggle_state: PASS - Toggles between 'TTS Ativo' and 'TTS Desligado'
tts_toggle.localStorage_persistence: PASS - State persisted to nc_tts key

pwa_support.manifest.json: PASS - Accessible at /manifest.json with correct structure

notes.pwa_install: PWA install button only shows when browser fires beforeinstallprompt event (not in all browsers/contexts)
notes.tts_toggle_visibility: TTS toggle only visible on desktop (lg breakpoint) when there's an active conversation
notes.credentials_masking: Keys >8 chars show first4****last4, keys <=8 chars show ****
